backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing product management (CRUD operations for admins), user profile management, and access control using MixinAuthorization with role-based permissions for admin, user, and guest access levels.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the deployment error fix in Version 21, listing affected frontend files, components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and configuration files with details about routing, error handling, loading states, and styling.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind directives and custom CSS variables defining OKLCH color system for light and dark themes with warm neutrals and earth tones.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with page title 'Fashion Forum' and root div for React application mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component configuring TanStack Router with routes (/, /product/$productId, /admin), QueryClient setup, and ProfileSetup modal logic for authenticated users without profiles.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Access denied screen component displaying shield alert icon and message for non-admin users attempting to access admin pages with return button.
frontend/src/components/AttackOnTitanGal: Swipeable gallery component for Attack on Titan T-shirt images with navigation arrows, thumbnail indicators, image loading states, and Meesho affiliate link button.
frontend/src/components/CategoryFilter.t: Category filter component rendering button group for filtering products by category or showing all products with active state styling.
frontend/src/components/CategoryImageSec: Expandable category section with clickable thumbnail that reveals a grid of product images, each with individual loading states and skeleton loaders.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component providing header with branding, navigation, authentication controls (login/logout), admin link, and footer. Manages Internet Identity authentication flow and displays user profile information.
frontend/src/components/LoadingTimeout.t: Displays a loading spinner that transitions to a timeout alert with retry option after a configurable duration. Provides user feedback for long-running operations.
frontend/src/components/MeeshoProductSec: Renders a single Meesho product image as a clickable link with hover overlay effect. Shows loading state while image loads.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Displays a product card with image, name, price, category badge, and optional Pinterest pin indicator. Includes hover effects and links to product detail page.
frontend/src/components/ProductForm.tsx: Form component for creating or editing products with fields for name, description, price, category, image URL, and Pinterest pin ID. Includes validation and submit/cancel actions.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name for profile setup. Cannot be dismissed until profile is saved.
frontend/src/components/SwipeableGallery: Image gallery with swipe gestures (touch and mouse) for navigation between product images. Includes navigation arrows, image counter, and Meesho promotional link.
frontend/src/components/WatchProductSect: Displays a carousel of watch product images with navigation controls and a clickable icon linking to Meesho. Uses lazy loading for images.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useImageLoader.ts: Custom hook for loading images with retry logic, fallback support, and loading/error state management for handling image load failures gracefully.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout functionality, managing identity state and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for product CRUD operations, admin status checks, and user profile management, integrating with the backend actor and providing toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useSwipeGesture.ts: Custom hook that detects swipe gestures on touch and mouse events, triggering callbacks for left/right swipes when movement exceeds a configurable threshold.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color palette using warm neutral tones for a fashion e-commerce theme, including light/dark mode variants and typography settings using Playfair Display and Inter fonts.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminProducts.tsx: Admin dashboard page for managing products with CRUD operations, access control checks, and a table/form interface for adding, editing, and deleting products.
frontend/src/pages/GalleryPage.tsx: Page component for displaying products in a gallery view (content truncated in provided source).
frontend/src/pages/ProductBrowse.tsx: Main product browsing page with category filtering, promotional sections, swipeable galleries, and external Meesho links. Includes hero banner, loading states, and error handling with retry functionality.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Product detail page displaying individual product information with image, price, description, category badge, and Pinterest link integration. Includes navigation back to browse page and loading/error states.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and parameter cleanup functionality.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, typography and container query plugins, custom fonts (Inter and Playfair Display), and animation keyframes for accordion components.
project_state.json: Project metadata indicating this is a fix request for investigating and resolving a deployment error that occurred in Version 21 production deployment.
